title: Pures Hackfleisch
description: Jay's personal modpack with pre-configured essentials.
body:
This Modpack is made primarily for myself, focussing on an improved Vanilla playing experience. This includes performance improvements, as well as inventory and UI enhancements.
This pack is completely compatible with vanilla multiplayer, but can also improve the singleplayer experience.
I also include my preferred settings, so don't be confused if you are used to the default settings.
Use this modpack if you want yet another Vanilla+ experience!

Please remember, that none of the mods included are made by me, and to please visit the mod's sites if you have any issues regarding the mods themselves.

Partial list of mods included:
- BetterF3
- Carpet
- Dynamic FPS
- Freecam
- Item Scroller
- LazyDFU
- Lithium
- MiniHUD
- ResolutionControl+
- ShulkerBoxTooltip
- Sodium
- Starlight
- Tweakeroo
- WorldEdit
